mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.name as department_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.department_id = d.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
SELECT u.*, d.name as department_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.department_id = d.id WHERE u.email = #{email}
SELECT u.*, d.name as department_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.department_id = d.id WHERE u.username = #{username}
SELECT u.*, d.name as department_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.department_id = d.id ORDER BY u.created_time DESC
SELECT u.*, d.name as department_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.department_id = d.id WHERE u.department_id = #{departmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, username, email, password, name, avatar, department_id, role, phone, status, password_expire_date) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{departmentId}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{passwordExpireDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, password_expire_date = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET last_login_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
